activate_when: user asks for PR or pull request review
user asks to review a diff, patch, branch, commit, or changed files
user asks for implementation review with code artifacts
do_not_activate_when: user asks for a product, book, course, restaurant, or service review without code
user asks for proofreading or UX copy critique without code artifacts
user asks for security audit depth better handled by audit-security
minimum_inputs: repository context plus requested review scope
missing_input_behavior: return needs_context with minimum_inputs_missing and no fabricated findings
